title: German Potato Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with sautéed potatoes and crispy onions.
instructions: Heat a large pan over medium heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced sweet onions and cook until caramelized, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced crispy onions and cook for 1 minute.
Warm the large wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Fill the wrap with the potato and onion mixture.
